display.purpose: Hero name only, one line, compact and confident.

body.purpose: Long-form reading, project summaries, and technical notes.

shadows.name: card-low
shadows.purpose: Barely visible ink-tinted lift for cards and ledger containers. Borders and tonal layers carry depth first.

motion.name: state-color
motion.purpose: Quiet hover and focus feedback without layout motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact ink action with quiet hover and visible focus.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.24 0.06 255); color: oklch(0.974 0.011 88); font: 500 14px/1.2 InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.3 0.06 255); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.24 0.06 255); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Badge
components.description: Small rounded metadata chip for tags and status labels.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.022 255); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.19 0.035 255); font: 600 12px/1.2 InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Ledger Row List
components.description: Bordered low-shadow container for repeated project and contact rows.
components.html: volumentialOpenCL-accelerated volume potential computation.uforthA Forth interpreter written in Hoon.
components.css: .ds-ledger { overflow: hidden; max-width: 560px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.022 255); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(0.992 0.006 88); color: oklch(0.19 0.035 255); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.19 0.035 255 / 0.08); } .ds-ledger-row { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.022 255); color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-ledger-row:last-child { border-bottom: 0; } .ds-ledger-row:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.018 255 / 0.55); } .ds-ledger-row strong { font: 600 16px/1.1 InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-ledger-row span { color: oklch(0.43 0.035 255); font: 400 14px/1.5 InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Top Navigation Link
components.description: Compact text navigation with a quiet rounded active state.
components.html: AboutPosts
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { min-height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; color: oklch(0.43 0.035 255); text-decoration: none; font: 500 14px/1.2 InterVariable, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.ds-active { background: oklch(0.92 0.018 255); color: oklch(0.19 0.035 255); }

narrative.overview: This visual system should feel like a carefully kept workbench log: precise, useful, compact, and quietly personal. It is a brand surface, but it should not behave like a campaign page. The design gives proof room to breathe: projects, publications, posts, and contact links should be inspectable without theatrical framing.
keyCharacteristics: Compact public identity with enough rhythm for scanning.
Long-form and math-heavy reading comfort over decoration.
Tactile, quiet components: bordered, useful, minimally lifted.
Personal details are small, specific, and intentional.
Durable surfaces that age like reference material.

rules.name: The Annotation Rule
rules.body: Amber is for rare annotations, selections, and signals. It must not flood the page.

rules.name: The Ink Rule
rules.body: Links and primary actions should feel like ink, not neon. Avoid saturated blues that read as generic web chrome.

rules.name: The No Costume Mono Rule
rules.body: Monospace is for dates, code, and metadata. Do not use it as a blanket technical costume.

rules.name: The Flat Ledger Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. If depth is needed, use border and tonal contrast first, shadow second.

dos: Do lead with proof: publications, projects, posts, and contact links should remain inspectable.
Do use ash-paper neutrals, ink foregrounds, and amber as a rare annotation.
Do use ledger rows for compact repeated material before reaching for cards.
Do preserve math readability with wide enough measure, scroll-safe equations, and stable code blocks.
Do respect reduced motion. State changes should be subtle and nonessential.
donts: Don't use SaaS polish: cream gradients, soft metric cards, startup section templates, or AI landing page sameness.
Don't create an academic CV dump: dense lists without hierarchy, rhythm, or point of view are prohibited.
Don't use designer portfolio theatrics: the work should not compete with decorative case-study styling.
Don't use terminal cosplay: fake prompts, all-mono pages, and hacker costume styling are forbidden.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe accent borders, decorative glassmorphism, or the hero-metric template.
